prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PINPOINTMETALDETECT-WTRPRF Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Pin Pointer Metal Detector Hand Held High Accuracy Wand Description: Locate metal easily with the ASR Outdoor Handheld Security Metal Detector.

This waterproof pinpointing metal detector is ideal for all terrains, and features a 360 degree antenna. It comes with vibrating feedback so you'll be sure to not miss anything while you're searching. In addition to the vibrating feedback, it also comes with a low battery indicator and requires a 9V battery (not included).

This device is simple to use - just press the power button to activate the unit. The green LED will light up and blink as it initializes, and during this process make sure to hold the unit stable and keep it away from metal. Once it is ready to use, the green LED will switch from blinking to steady. Upon detecting metal, the green light will turn off as the red light turns on and the unit will then start to vibrate to save power.

After about 15 seconds of continuous detection of the same target, the unit will suspend operation while the green LED will remain on. Detection for a new target will begin immediately after you press the power button to shut off the unit.

This device is ideal for treasure hunting at the beach, under water or in dirt. Make sure to grab one of these before your next metal prospecting adventure. Search Terms: metal detecting treasure hunting camping accessories prospecting gem Features: - 360 Degree Detection Area - Waterproof Construction | Ideal for All Terrains - Vibrating Feedback - Requires (1) 9V Battery (Not Included) - Low Battery Indicator | Green & Red LED Lights === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
